bag.confirm_empty_bag:
You are about to empty your bag!

Are you sure?
bag.shop_checkout_text: In the next step, we'll take you to the LEGO Shop checkout. Please note that your "Bricks & Pieces" order will show as one item in your basket.

brick.out_of_stock: This part is out of stock. If you submit your request, we'll get in touch to let you know when it's expected back or to offer you a substitute.
brick.quantity_limit: Quantity for the selected part exceeds the quantity in this set.

check.whats_next_text: If we need more details for our quality department, we'll be in touch in the next couple of days. Otherwise we'll simply post a replacement as soon as possible and send you a shipping confirmation to let you know the parts are on their way. Delivery to the US takes 7-10 business days, while delivery to Canada takes 10-14 business days. Delivery times to other regions can be found here

choose_brick.brick_sold_out_in_missing_broken_flow: This part is out of stock. If you submit your request, we’ll get in touch to let you know when it’s expected back or to offer you a substitute.
choose_brick.cant_find_what_im_looking_for: I can't find what I'm looking for
choose_brick.find_it_text: Give us as much detail about your part as you can. If you know the part number or design number, that will make it much easier for us to find the right bricks.
choose_brick.no_bricks_found: No bricks were found with that element or design number.

enter_set_number_tab.dont_know_set_number: I don't know the set number
enter_set_number_tab.find_an_element_or_design_below: Find an element or design number below
enter_set_number_tab.help_us_find_it_headline: Give us as much detail about your set or your part as you can. If you know the part number, design number or the name of your set, that will make it much easier for us to find the right brick.
enter_set_number_tab.help_us_improve_dialog_body: Please tell us in detail what's wrong with the piece to help our quality team make sure theis won't happen again.
enter_set_number_tab.invalid_search_term_text: You entered an invalid search term, product numbers are mostly 5 digits and element numbers 7 digits
enter_set_number_tab.item_number_placeholder_text: Enter an item number or design ID
enter_set_number_tab.no_bricks: No bricks were found with that element or design number.
enter_set_number_tab.please_describe_the_piece_you_need: Please describe the piece you need
enter_set_number_tab.set_number_placeholder_text: Enter a 4-7 digit set number to see all bricks in the set
enter_set_number_tab.what_is_a_set_number_text: You'll find the set number just below the LEGO logo on the building instructions, on the box and the product page of our website.

additional_info.no_email_support: At this time, we do not have a contact address for your region. However, if you use our Contact Us Email form and write in English, we'll do our best to respond to your email.
additional_info.no_mail_support: At this time, we do not have a contact address for your region. However, if you use our Contact Us Email form and write in English, we'll do our best to respond to your email.
additional_info.no_phone_support: At this time, we do not offer telephone support for your region. However, if you use our Contact Us Email form and write in English, we'll do our best to respond to your email.
additional_info.phone_notice_fee: Our free number might be blocked by some telecom providers and may incur charges when called from a mobile phone. Please contact your provider for more details.

address.max_length_validation: This field can only contain {maxLength} characters.
address.title: Your Info

details.detail_message: You can write your message in English, Chinese (Simplified or Traditional), Czech, Danish, Dutch, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hungarian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Latvian, Lithuanian, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Russian, Slovak, Slovene, Spanish, Swedish and Turkish.
details.message_placeholder: Click to write your message. There's enough space for 2000 characters.
details.title: Details

done.error: Something went wrong! Go back and try again, or try again later.
done.thanks_message: Your message has been sent and you will receive an email confirmation shortly.
done.title: Done

error_pop_up.error_body: Apparently something went wrong on our end, maybe try again later, we'll look into it.

error.external_knowledgebase_error: Our help topics section is currently undergoing maintenance. This means that what you're trying to find is not currently available. Please come back later and it should be working again. Sorry for the inconvenience!
error.not_found: Sorry, we can't find that article or topic! It might be an old link or maybe it moved.

help_topics.list_title: What can we help you with?

search.no_results: We couldn't find anything for your search in our Help Topics. Try using another search term or get in touch so we can help!
search.no_results_sidebar: Sorry, we did not find anything based on your request
